sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35049" key="e)nattiki/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐναττῐκίζω</orth>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐναττικίζουσι τῷ Χωρίῳ αἱ ἀηδόνες</foreign> the nightingales <sense id="n35049.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sing in</tr_> this place <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">just as in Attica</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philostr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Her.Prooem.</title_> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
